<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Store a credential"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/credentials"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



🚧 *Coming Soon* — Store a new credential securely.

The credential value is encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM and is **never
returned** after this call. Only the credential ID and metadata are accessible
via subsequent GET requests.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
